recentItems.title: Hantavirus Updates - County of San Luis Obispo (.gov)
recentItems.summary: As of the latest update, the 2026 MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak in San Luis Obispo County has resulted in 12 confirmed cases and 4 deaths, with 38 individuals under quarantine. County health officials stated the outbreak is linked to the cruise ship MV Hondius and urged anyone with symptoms to seek immediate medical care.

recentItems.title: Canadians on ship at centre of hantavirus outbreak land in Canada - thecanadianpressnews.ca
recentItems.summary: The 2026 MV Hondius hantavirus outbreak resulted in 70 confirmed cases and 10 deaths among passengers and crew, with 42 individuals still in quarantine upon the ship's arrival in Canada; Canadian health officials stated that all affected are receiving medical care and that the outbreak is contained to the vessel.

recentItems.title: Andes Hantavirus Outbreak on a Cruise Ship, 2026 - NEJM Evidence
recentItems.summary: A hantavirus pulmonary syndrome outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship in 2026 resulted in 14 confirmed cases of Andes orthohantavirus among passengers and crew, including 5 deaths; the ship was quarantined for 10 days in Ushuaia, Argentina, where local health officials reported no secondary transmission among the 1,200 remaining passengers and crew after the quarantine period.
